context: Hard: DB pool closed before in-flight requests drain during shutdown

checklist.name: Catches shutdown ordering bug
checklist.description: Identifies that the database connection pool (or store) is closed before in-flight HTTP requests finish draining, causing mid-query requests to fail with connection errors during graceful shutdown

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it changes server lifecycle management
